tools.name: earlyDayMotions.getEarlyDayMotionsList
tools.description: Get a list of Early Day Motions which meet the specified criteria. Only supports Published and Withdrawn status.

tools.name: earlyDayMotions.publishedEarlyDayMotionGet
tools.description: Get a single Early Day Motion which has the ID specified.

tools.name: oralQuestions.publishedOralQuestionGet
tools.description: A list of oral questions meeting the specified criteria.

tools.name: oralQuestionTimes.publishedOralQuestionTimeGet
tools.description: A list of oral question times meeting the specified criteria.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
